title: Beyond Glucose: Why Standard Metabolic Tests Miss Early Danger
description: Beyond fasting glucose and HbA1c, a deeper look at metabolic health reveals critical insights from markers like fasting insulin, C-peptide, and continuous glucose monitoring. This piece investigates why current standard tests often miss early warning signs of insulin resistance and how a more comprehensive approach can empower proactive health management.
